---
title: "A Beautiful Graphic"
author: "Astri Cahyani"
format: html
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

Astri Cahyani

```{r}
#| include: false

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Filter for a few iconic hurricanes
major_storms <- storms %>% 
  filter(name %in% c("Katrina", "Andrew", "Harvey", "Ian"))

# Create a beautiful tracking graphic
ggplot(data = major_storms, aes(x = long, y = lat, color = wind, group = interaction(name, year))) +
  geom_path(size = 1.2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ name, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", name = "Wind Speed\n(knots)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40", margin = margin(b = 15)),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Tracking Historic Hurricanes",
    subtitle = "Storm paths colored by maximum sustained wind speed",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )
```
